/CAL:STATUS OF ALTERNATIVE SENTENCING DISPOSITION/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOP/

/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING & BAIL MOTION/X:THE COURT HEARS THE DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS MONITOR AND PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL HOME DETENTION,/DEF:IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP BY HIS PARENTS WHO WILL TRANSPORT DEFENDANT TO THE HOUSE OF HIS COUSIN, PRECIOUS, IN SAN MATEO COUNTY WHERE DEFENDANT WILL REMAIN WHILEON HOME DETENTION,/DEF:MAY ENTER THE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOR PURPOSESOF LEGITIMATE WORK WITH THE CCSF, COURT APPOINTMENTS AND MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS,/WS/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT OWN, POSSESS OR OTHERWISE MAINTAIN UNDERHIS CARE,CUSTODY OR CONTROL ANY DANGEROUS OR DEADLY WEAPONS INCLUDING FIREARMS OR PARTS OF FIREARMS OR WEAPONS OF ANY OTHER TYPE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSESS AMMUNITION, IN ANY QUANTITY, NOR ANY AMMUNITION LOADING DEVICE/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS PROHIBITED ON ALL DATES AND AT ALL TIMES,FROM ENTERING THE ALEMANY PROJECTS IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY ALEMANY BLVD, TO THE SOUTH;CRESCENT AVENUE TO THE NORTH, FOLSOM STREET TO THE EAST AND ST, MARY'S PARKTO THE WEST, INCLUDING FOR THE PURPOSE OF WORK/CTORD:IF DEFENDANT VIOLATES ANY ASPECT OF THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF HIS RELEASE TO HOME DETENTION,HE SHALL BE APPREHENDED INTO CUSTODY WITHOUT BAIL UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/STWPX/CONTD:STATUS OF ASP DISPOSITION AND COMPLIANCE WITH COURT ORDERS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:NOICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN FILED IN COURT BYTHE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS SIGNED AND FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENTNG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO DETAIN DEFENDANT,/NB/NTW/LDPX:12-30-20/CAUSE1/SA1:MARCUS SMITH/SAORD/TE:3 HOURS FOR TWO PRELIMINARY HEARINGS/CONTD:D20 TO SET ON 11-16-20/DOP/CONTD:BAIL REVIEW ON 11-17-20/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S FEDERAL CUSTODY/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS IN FEDERAL CUSTODY/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:60,000/BWNUM: 1ST/X:NO CITE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS IN FEDERAL CUSTODY/CONTD:STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S FEDERAL CUSTODY & DISCHARGE SAW/DOPC/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING OR DISPO/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS CURRENTLY IN FEDERAL CUSTODY/CONTD: PHC & STATUS OF FEDERAL CHARGES/DOPC/
/CAL:PRELIM HEARING & DEFENSE BAIL MOTION, LDPX 12-29-20/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 19/TRANS 19:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIM HEARING & DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/TEXT:CAUSE IS ORDERED RETURNED TO DEPT 22/RET22/X:FORTHWITH TO SET AND MOTION TO CONTINUE/
